meta.title: DEF CON Safe Mode Red Team Village - Daniel Miessler -  Mechanizing Methodology Automating Discovery
meta.description: There are a million techniques out there for finding new attack surface and finding potential vulnerabilities; the problem is finding the time to run your entire methodology against all your targets. This talk will take you through finding new attack surface, performing multiple types of test against those targets, and sending real-time alerts---all on a continuous basis using automation from a cloud-based Linux host.
